---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for LynxX
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## 🚀 Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

## 💡 Problem It Solves

Is your feature request related to a problem? Describe it clearly.
e.g. "I'm always frustrated when..."

## 🎯 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Have you considered any alternative approaches or workarounds?

## 📍 Affected Area

- [ ] Smart Contract (Soroban / Rust)
- [ ] Frontend (React / Next.js)
- [ ] Wallet SDK (`lynxx-wallet-sdk`)
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Other

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context, mockups, or references here.
